steps.dispatch_command:
'timeout' '--kill-after=1s' '240s' 'codex' 'exec' '--json' '-C' '/home/unnamed/project/vida-stack' '-s' 'workspace-write' '-m' 'gpt-5.4' '-c' 'model_reasoning_effort="medium"' 'Packet run_id=feature-update-only-agents-sidecar-add-project-spec
Target=specification
Runtime role=business_analyst
Root session role=orchestrator
Execution mode=delegated_orchestration_cycle
Canonical delegated execution surface=vida agent-init
This packet activation view is not an execution receipt and does not transfer root-session write authority.
If the selected host/backend returns only this activation view without execution evidence, treat that as a bridge blocker, not as delegated work completion.
If a bounded read-only diagnostic path still exists, continue diagnosis to a code-level blocker or next bounded fix before asking the user to choose a route.
Host subagent APIs are backend details only; do not substitute them for the project runtime'"'"'s delegated lane contract.
Host-local shell/edit capability is not a write-authority receipt.
First substantive response: publish a concise plan before edits or implementation.
If the user explicitly ordered agent-first or parallel-agent execution, keep that routing sticky and do not silently substitute root-session implementation.
Under continued-development intent, stay in commentary/progress mode; final closure wording is forbidden unless the user explicitly asks to stop.
Do not treat commentary, status output, an intermediate report, an intermediate status update, or “I have explained the result” as a lawful pause boundary.
When recording task notes from shell, prefer `vida task update <task-id> --notes-file <path> --json` over inline shell quoting for complex text.
This delegated lane does not hold root-session orchestration authority.
You are already inside the delegated lane activation; do not call `vida agent-init` again from this lane.
Do not run root-only orchestration commands from this lane; leave status/recovery/continue surfaces to the orchestrator/root session.
Do not treat commentary, status output, or an intermediate report from this lane as a completion boundary; keep working until the bounded handoff result or blocker is ready.
Do not bind the next continuation item from this delegated lane; return bounded evidence so the orchestrator/root session can resume routing.
If you hit a bridge blocker, runtime timeout, or patch-location ambiguity, report the bounded blocker and wait for orchestrator reroute rather than reclaiming root-session fallback.
Replan checkpoints: after_design_gate, after_work_pool_shape, after_dev_packet_shape, after_implementation_evidence, after_review_evidence, after_verification_evidence
Goal: execute only this bounded handoff and produce receipt-backed evidence.
Request: Update only AGENTS.sidecar.md. Add a project rule that, besides tracking and fixing runtime defects, the system must also continuously track command surfaces, command options, and operator information output; when gaps, missing commands/options, or needed output additions are detected, it must analyze the related code/spec/impact and add or fix those command and output surfaces proactively and automatically. Keep scope strictly to AGENTS.sidecar.md and preserve existing style.'
